# FIG_S4 — Data Structure

**Sample:** HBQ 100 mM in DMSO-d6, 1-arm 1D vibrational echo, T2 scan  
**Generated by:** `VE1DExperiment` class (`HBQ_3DVE/1DVE/VE1DExperiment.m`)  
**Source scan:** `ve_1D_HBQ_100mM_dmso_d6_150u_1arm_z_10_05_off_4_test_051.dat`

---

## Loading

```matlab
f = load('ve_1D_HBQ_100mM_dmso_d6_150u_1arm_z_10_05_off_4_test_051_20260423_181059.mat');
s = f.s;   % all data lives in the struct s
```

---

## Struct fields

| Field | Size | Units | Description |
|-------|------|-------|-------------|
| `s.label` | string | — | Human-readable scan name |
| `s.time` | `[1 × 401]` | fs | Time axis |
| `s.waveAxis` | `[1 × 1600]` | cm⁻¹ | Full CCD axis (`1e7 / wavelength_nm`) |
| `s.pixelRange` | `[1 × 2]` | pixel indices | Active spectral window used: `[580, 950]` |
| `s.rawData` | `[1600 × 401]` | mOD | Probe-normalized data before filtering |
| `s.processedData` | `[1600 × 401]` | mOD | Data after Savitzky-Golay filter (see below) |
| `s.isFiltered` | logical | — | `true` — SG filter was applied |
| `s.filterOpts` | struct | — | Filter parameters (see below) |

### filterOpts fields

| Field | Value | Description |
|-------|-------|-------------|
| `order` | `5` | SG polynomial order |
| `window` | `35` | SG window length (pixels) |
| `dim` | `1` | Filtered along wavelength dimension |
| `pixelRange` | `[580, 950]` | Rows that were filtered |
| `apply` | `true` | Filter was active |
